lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior are flawless with no signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep shine and no visible scratches, dents, or stone chips. Inside, the interior is immaculate, smelling fresh and showing zero signs of wear on the seats, carpets, or dashboard. Mechanically, the car performs perfectly, offering a smooth and quiet ride with a responsive engine and seamless gear transitions. All features and electronics are in full working order. This is a collector-quality vehicle that looks and drives like it just left the showroom, making it an ideal choice for a buyer who demands perfection.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and severe staining. Mechanical systems are currently unreliable and require major repairs.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical repairs, including engine work and transmission service, to be safely roadworthy. The exterior displays heavy rust, deep scratches, and several large dents, while the interior shows significant wear, including torn upholstery and broken trim pieces. This would be an ideal project car for an enthusiast or a valuable source for spare parts for someone rebuilding a similar model.

Get ready to turn heads with this stunning vehicle! It is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it just came off the showroom floor. Every detail has been meticulously maintained, ensuring it remains in flawless, like-new shape inside and out. This is a rare opportunity to own a perfectly preserved car that offers a truly premium driving experience!

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits flawless exterior aesthetics and a pristine interior environment, reflecting a history of fastidious care. Mechanically superior and visually indistinguishable from its original showroom state, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total gem. It’s been garage-kept and pampered since day one—the paint is sparkling, the interior is spotless, and it drives just like it did when it first hit the road! I’ve been super meticulous with the upkeep, so it really is in spectacular shape. You’ve got to see it in person to believe how well it’s been cared for. Feel free to reach out if you want to take this beauty for a spin!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. This example is mechanically flawless, with documented preventative maintenance including a comprehensive Vanos overhaul and rod bearing replacement to ensure peak internal tolerances. The chassis is structurally reinforced at the subframe mounting points, maintaining factory-spec rigidity. It retains its original suspension geometry and limited-slip differential, providing exceptional lateral grip and communicative feedback. The undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting a life of climate-controlled storage and zero deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle in impeccable, showroom condition. The exterior features original, high-gloss paint completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather remains supple without a single crease, and all interior surfaces retain their factory-fresh finish. Every technological feature and electronic component operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with full documentation included. It delivers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that has been maintained to the highest possible standard.

Presented here is an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated to the highest exacting standards, exhibiting a showroom-quality finish and an interior entirely devoid of wear. Every mechanical component functions with factory-level precision, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection, this offering represents the definitive pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously inspected and preserved to the highest standards, it offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning professional. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage and pampered like a member of the family. Seriously, there isn't a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I'm only letting it go because I'm downsizing, so here's your chance to grab a total gem that’s been loved every single mile. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3, a pinnacle of Bavarian engineering featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This example utilizes a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to deliver power through a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is
Mint condition. Garage kept. One owner. No accidents. Full service history. Professional detail just completed.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Every inch of the deep obsidian paint maintains a mirror-like finish, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating and kept strictly in a climate-controlled garage. Step inside to find an interior that is virtually indistinguishable from the day it left the showroom; the premium leather seats remain firm and supple with zero signs of bolster wear, and the cabin retains that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a thick folder of records to prove it. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road salt or inclement weather use. This is a rare opportunity to own a meticulously preserved example that drives as flawlessly as it looks. No stories, no excuses—just perfection for the discerning collector.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained in impeccable condition. This unit exhibits a showroom-quality aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning standards. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand uncompromising excellence and a turnkey driving experience.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, preserved in a state that reflects a standard of care synonymous with a showroom environment. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, has been maintained with uncompromising attention to detail. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with surgical precision, having undergone a rigorous certification process to ensure it meets our exacting criteria for excellence. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of exemplary provenance and condition.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been pampered and garage-kept its whole life, and I’ve taken care of every little detail. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner who will love it as much as I do. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 V8 era. Meticulously maintained, the naturally aspirated 4.0L powerplant features individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,400 RPM redline, delivering linear power through a precision-gated 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut, featuring Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a variable M differential lock for optimal lateral dynamics. This specimen boasts a documented rod bearing service and subframe inspection, ensuring mechanical integrity. Finished in Interlagos Blue with a carbon fiber roof, the exterior retains its factory luster with zero paint correction required. The interior is pristine, featuring Novillo leather and carbon leather trim, free of bolster wear or UV degradation. A true collector-grade vehicle for the discerning purist
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history available. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This car has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, appearing exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the factory-fresh scent is remarkably preserved. Every electronic feature functions flawlessly, and the mechanical components have been serviced exclusively by certified technicians with a complete, documented service history included. From the spotless engine bay to the curb-rash-free alloy wheels wrapped in high-performance tires, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a collector-grade example that drives with the tight, responsive precision of a brand-new vehicle. Serious inquiries only for this turn-key masterpiece.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, reflecting a standard of preservation typically reserved for private collections. Every surface and mechanical component has been maintained to an exacting standard, ensuring a showroom-quality experience for the discerning driver. An investment-grade opportunity for those who demand excellence.

Presenting an exceptional specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile, representative of its showroom-grade provenance. With uncompromising attention to detail evident in every surface, this offering caters to the most discerning collector seeking a truly superlative driving experience.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is. I've babied it since day one, and it looks just as stunning as the day it rolled off the lot! It's in absolutely flawless shape—not a single scratch or ding to be found, and the interior still has that fresh, new-car feel. It drives like an absolute dream and has been kept tucked away in a climate-controlled garage. I’m truly sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3, a pinnacle of BMW engineering. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for surgical power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag Type D 6-speed manual gearbox provides crisp, tactile shifts, transmitting power through a GKN-viscous limited-slip differential. Mechanically optimized with documented subframe reinforcement and rod bearing service, the chassis dynamics remain as sharp as the day it left Regensburg. The exterior retains its factory luster with consistent paint meter readings, while the interior remains free of bolster wear or delamination. A definitive collector-grade icon with a
Used car. Mint condition. No cosmetic damage. Low mileage. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in breathtaking condition that rivals any showroom floor model. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero swirls, chips, or imperfections, having been meticulously garage-kept and protected by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather remains supple with no bolster wear, the original carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a complete, documented service history at authorized intervals. It drives with the precision and tightness of a brand-new vehicle, offering a smooth, powerful experience with no leaks or unusual noises. This sale includes all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a comprehensive folder of maintenance records. For the discerning buyer seeking a flawless example of this model, this is an unparalleled opportunity.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, mirroring its original showroom presentation both aesthetically and mechanically. Every detail has been preserved with meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. We invite the most discerning collectors to inspect this peerless example of engineering refinement.
